title: setaria maritima
intro: Setaria maritima, also known as coastal barnyard grass or sea bristle-grass, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, fever, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The herbal preparations of Setaria maritima include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make remedies for the aforementioned health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
